title: Photons behave very strangely if you try to cut them
description: Particles of light cannot be divided into smaller particles, but if you try to snip off the end of one, instead of shortening it multiplies
author: Karmela Padavic-Callaghan

title: Aim high but don't shoot for the moon, mathematicians advise
description: According to a mathematical model of how people weigh up different outcomes, the optimal strategy is to be ambitious, but not overly so
author: Alex Wilkins

title: Horror video game gets its creepiness from a quantum computer
description: Quantum Backrooms is a horror game in which the player explores eerie rooms. The twist is that the rooms have been generated by a quantum computer
author: Karmela Padavic-Callaghan

title: MindWe're becoming more individualistic and it's affecting our love livesNews
author: New Scientist

title: Mirror life: Scientists clash over threat of lab-engineered bacteria
description: Bacteria created using mirror images of natural biomolecules would pose a grave threat to life on Earth, some researchers warn, but a new study suggests they would struggle to survive in the wild
author: James Woodford

title: Pancreatic cancer halted by virus injection in three patients
description: A cancer-killing virus has stopped pancreatic tumours from growing and spreading in three people in an initial safety trial, raising hopes that it may help to beat the deadly condition
author: Alice Klein
